modules.module_title: Specific Eco-Friendly Product Categories (e.g., Paper, Fabric, Cleaning)
Quality Control, Packaging & Marketing of Eco-Friendly Products

questions.question: Ek eco-friendly product ka primary benefit kya hota hai?

options.B: Yeh environment ko kam nuksan pahunchata hai
options.C: Yeh jaldi kharab ho jata hai
options.D: Yeh sirf bade shehron mein milta hai

questions.explanation: Eco-friendly products ka mukhya uddeshya environment par negative impact ko kam karna hota hai.

questions.question: 3 R's of sustainability mein 'Reduce' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Apni khapat (consumption) kam karna
options.C: Purani cheezon ko naye roop mein istemal karna

questions.explanation: 'Reduce' ka matlab hai ki humein apne resources ka upyog kam karna chahiye, jisse waste kam ho.

questions.question: Biodegradable products ki kya khaasiyat hoti hai?

options.B: Yeh chemical processes se decompose hote hain
options.C: Yeh natural processes se decompose ho jaate hain
options.D: Yeh sirf high temperature par decompose hote hain

questions.explanation: Biodegradable products natural organisms (jaise bacteria) ki madad se tukdon mein toot jaate hain aur environment mein mil jaate hain.

questions.question: Sustainable development ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf economic growth par focus karna
options.B: Future generations ki needs ko compromise kiye bina present needs ko pura karna
options.C: Natural resources ka unlimited use karna

questions.explanation: Sustainable development ka matlab hai ki hum apne resources ka is tarah se upyog karein ki future generations ke liye bhi woh available rahein.

questions.question: Ek product ko 'eco-friendly' tab kehte hain jab:

options.B: Uske production, use aur disposal mein environmental impact kam ho

questions.explanation: Eco-friendly product ka matlab hai ki uska poora life cycle (manufacturing se le kar disposal tak) environment par kam se kam negative impact dale.

questions.question: Plastic bags ki jagah hum kaun sa eco-friendly option use kar sakte hain?

options.B: Cloth bags

questions.explanation: Cloth bags reusable aur biodegradable hote hain, jo plastic bags ka ek behtar paryavaran-friendly vikalp hain.

questions.question: Pollution ko kam karne mein eco-friendly products kaise madad karte hain?

options.A: Yeh zyada energy consume karte hain
options.B: Yeh kam chemicals aur resources use karte hain
options.C: Yeh jaldi kharab ho jaate hain
options.D: Yeh sirf bade factories mein bante hain

questions.explanation: Eco-friendly products banate samay kam harmful chemicals aur natural resources ka upyog hota hai, jisse pollution kam hota hai.

questions.question: 'Cradle-to-Cradle' design concept ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Product ko sirf ek baar use karna
options.B: Product ko is tarah design karna ki uske materials reuse ya recycle ho sakein
options.C: Product ko bachpan se budhape tak use karna

questions.explanation: Cradle-to-Cradle design mein product ke materials ko waste na banne dekar, unhein naye products ke liye nutrient ke roop mein dekha jata hai.

questions.question: Agar aap ek product ko 'upcycle' kar rahe hain, toh aap kya kar rahe hain?

options.B: Use repair kar rahe hain
options.C: Use ek naya aur behtar product banane ke liye use kar rahe hain

questions.explanation: Upcycling mein waste materials ko ek naye product mein transform kiya jata hai, jiski value original se zyada hoti hai.

questions.question: Kon sa action 'reuse' category mein aata hai?

options.A: Plastic bottle ko dustbin mein dalna
options.B: Purani T-shirt se cleaning rag banana
options.C: Paper ko recycle bin mein dalna

questions.explanation: Purani T-shirt ko cleaning rag ke roop mein istemal karna ek tareeka hai cheezon ko dobara use karne ka.

questions.question: Greenhouse gas emissions ko kam karne mein eco-friendly products kaise contribute karte hain?

options.A: Woh zyada energy use karte hain
options.B: Woh renewable energy sources se bante hain ya kam energy use karte hain
options.C: Woh sirf non-renewable resources se bante hain
options.D: Unka transport cost zyada hota hai

questions.explanation: Eco-friendly products aksar renewable energy ka use karte hain ya unke production mein kam energy lagti hai, jisse emissions kam hote hain.

questions.question: Kon sa term ek product ke environment par total impact ko describe karta hai, uske production se le kar disposal tak?

options.B: Eco-label

questions.explanation: Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) ek comprehensive evaluation hai jo product ke poore jeevan chakra ke environmental impacts ko analyze karta hai.

questions.question: Ek farmer chemical pesticides ki jagah neem oil use karta hai. Yeh kis principle ko follow karta hai?

options.B: Eco-friendliness

questions.explanation: Neem oil ek natural pesticide hai jo environment ke liye kam harmful hota hai, isliye yeh eco-friendliness ke principle ko follow karta hai.

questions.question: Water conservation ke liye aap apne ghar mein kya eco-friendly product use kar sakte hain?

options.B: Water-saving tap aerators

questions.explanation: Water-saving tap aerators paani ke flow ko control karte hain aur uski khapat kam karte hain, jisse paani bachaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Eco-friendly products banane ka ek mukhya challenge kya hai?

options.B: Sustainable raw materials ki availability

questions.explanation: Sustainable raw materials ki sourcing aur unki consistent availability aksar eco-friendly product manufacturers ke liye ek challenge hoti hai.

questions.question: Kon sa statement 'Greenwashing' ko sahi tareeke se describe karta hai?

options.A: Jab ek company apne products ko genuinely eco-friendly banati hai
options.B: Jab ek company apne products ko misleading tarike se eco-friendly dikhati hai
options.C: Jab ek company green color ke products banati hai
options.D: Jab ek company organic farming karti hai

questions.explanation: Greenwashing ek marketing tactic hai jahan companies apne products ko actual se zyada eco-friendly dikhane ki koshish karti hain, aksar jhoothe daave karke.

questions.question: Ek product ko 'reparable' banana kis eco-friendly design principle se juda hai?

options.B: Durability and extended lifespan

questions.explanation: Reparable products ko repair karke unki lifespan badhai ja sakti hai, jo durability aur extended lifespan ke principle ka hissa hai, aur waste kam karta hai.

questions.question: Kon sa material natural fiber ki category mein aata hai?

options.B: Polyester

questions.explanation: Cotton ek natural fiber hai jo plants se milta hai, jabki baaki synthetic fibers hain.

questions.question: Recycled paper banane ke liye kis raw material ka upyog hota hai?

options.B: Used paper and cardboard

questions.explanation: Recycled paper banate samay purane papers aur cardboards ko raw material ke roop mein use kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Biodegradable plastic banane ke liye kon sa natural source use kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Corn starch

questions.explanation: Corn starch, potato starch jaise plant-based materials ka upyog biodegradable plastics banane ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Organic cotton ki farming mein kya avoid kiya jata hai?

options.B: Sunlight

questions.explanation: Organic cotton ki kheti mein synthetic pesticides, fertilizers aur genetically modified seeds ka use nahi kiya jata.

questions.question: Bamboo ek sustainable raw material kyun mana jata hai?

options.B: Yeh bahut jaldi badhta hai aur kam paani ki zaroorat hoti hai
options.C: Yeh sirf ek baar use ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Bamboo ek fast-growing plant hai, jise kam paani ki zaroorat hoti hai aur yeh soil erosion ko bhi rokta hai, isliye yeh sustainable hai.

questions.question: Kon sa material animal-derived sustainable option hai, jo leather ka alternative ho sakta hai?

options.B: PU leather (synthetic)

questions.explanation: Mushroom leather (Mycelium) ek innovative plant-based alternative hai jo leather jaisa feel deta hai aur sustainable hai. PVC aur PU synthetic hain.

questions.question: Agar aap DIY cleaning product bana rahe hain, toh kon sa ingredient harmful chemical ko replace kar sakta hai?

options.B: Ammonia

questions.explanation: Vinegar ek natural disinfectant aur cleaning agent hai jo kai harmful chemicals ka safe alternative hai.

questions.question: Hemp fiber ki kya khaasiyat hai jo use eco-friendly banati hai?

options.A: Ise bahut zyada pesticides ki zaroorat hoti hai
options.B: Yeh kam paani aur pesticides mein ugta hai aur bahut strong hota hai
options.D: Yeh sirf warm climates mein ugta hai

questions.explanation: Hemp ek robust crop hai jo kam paani, pesticides aur fertilizers mein grow hota hai aur iske fibers bahut durable hote hain.

questions.question: Ecological footprint ko kam karne ke liye kon sa raw material choose karna chahiye?

options.B: Locally sourced materials

questions.explanation: Locally sourced materials ka transport kam hota hai, jisse fuel consumption aur carbon emissions kam hote hain, aur local economy ko support milta hai.

questions.question: Kon sa material ek renewable resource hai?

options.B: Petroleum

questions.explanation: Solar energy ek renewable resource hai jo kabhi khatm nahi hoti, jabki baaki fossil fuels non-renewable hain.

questions.question: Post-consumer recycled (PCR) content ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Material jo manufacturing process se bacha ho
options.B: Material jo consumer use ke baad recycle kiya gaya ho
options.C: Material jo naya banaya gaya ho
options.D: Material jo ek hi baar use hua ho

questions.explanation: PCR content un materials ko refer karta hai jo consumers dwara use kiye jane ke baad collect aur recycle kiye jaate hain, jaise plastic bottles.

questions.question: Wool ek eco-friendly option ho sakta hai, agar woh kis tarah se sourced ho?

options.B: Cruelty-free aur sustainable farming practices se

questions.explanation: Wool sustainable tab hota hai jab uski sourcing ethical aur environmentally responsible ho, jisme animals ka khayal rakha jaye aur land management accha ho.

questions.question: Kon sa material sabse lamba time leta hai decompose hone mein?

options.B: Paper

questions.explanation: Glass bottles ko decompose hone mein hazaron saal lag sakte hain, jabki organic materials aur paper jaldi decompose ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Natural dyes banane ke liye kis cheez ka upyog kiya jata hai?

options.B: Plants, insects aur minerals

questions.explanation: Natural dyes plants (jaise haldi, indigo), insects (jaise cochineal) aur minerals se banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar aap ek furniture piece bana rahe hain, toh kon sa wood source sabse sustainable hoga?

options.A: Illegal logging se mila hua wood
options.B: FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) certified wood

questions.explanation: FSC certified wood yeh ensure karta hai ki wood sustainably managed forests se aata hai, jahan environmental aur social standards ka palan kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Kon sa material ek 'closed-loop' system mein use kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Recyclable glass

questions.explanation: Closed-loop system mein materials ko repeatedly recycle aur reuse kiya jata hai, jisse waste minimize ho. Glass ek accha example hai jo kai baar recycle ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar aap ek eco-friendly product bana rahe hain, toh aapko raw material sourcing mein kya priority deni chahiye?

options.A: Sabse sasta material, chahe woh kitna bhi harmful ho
options.B: Material jo duur se import kiya gaya ho
options.C: Material jo ethically sourced, renewable aur low-impact ho
options.D: Material jo sabse naya aur trendy ho

questions.explanation: Eco-friendly product ke liye ethically sourced, renewable aur low-impact materials ko priority deni chahiye, jisse environmental aur social responsibility bani rahe.

questions.question: Eco-friendly product design mein 'Durability' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Product ki lifespan kam ho
options.C: Product lamba chale aur waste kam ho
options.D: Product ko repair na kiya ja sake

questions.explanation: Durable products ki lifespan zyada hoti hai, jisse unhein baar-baar replace karne ki zaroorat nahi padti aur waste kam hota hai.

questions.question: Product design mein 'Design for Disassembly' ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Product ko aasani se toda ja sake
options.B: Product ko repair aur recycle karna aasan ho
options.C: Product ko assemble karna mushkil ho
options.D: Product ki manufacturing cost badh jaye

questions.explanation: Design for Disassembly se product ke components ko aasani se alag kiya ja sakta hai, jisse repair aur recycling efficient ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Ek eco-friendly manufacturing process mein energy efficiency ka kya role hai?

options.B: Non-renewable energy sources ka zyada use karna
options.C: Kam energy use karna aur renewable sources ko prefer karna

questions.explanation: Energy efficiency manufacturing ke carbon footprint ko kam karti hai, aur renewable energy ka upyog sustainable practices ko badhawa deta hai.

questions.question: Manufacturing mein 'Waste Minimization' ka matlab kya hai?

options.B: Waste ko manage karne ke liye zyada resources use karna
options.C: Production process mein waste ko kam karna ya avoid karna

questions.explanation: Waste Minimization ka uddeshya manufacturing ke dauraan generate hone wale kachre ko kam karna ya usse bachna hai.

questions.question: Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) mein kon sa stage shamil nahi hota hai?

options.B: Product manufacturing

questions.explanation: LCA product ke environmental impacts ko evaluate karta hai, manufacturing, use aur disposal tak. Marketing budget iska hissa nahi hai.

questions.question: Ek product ko 'modular' design karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Ise repair karna mushkil ho jata hai
options.B: Iske parts ko aasani se replace ya upgrade kiya ja sakta hai
options.C: Yeh sirf ek hi tarah se use ho sakta hai
options.D: Iska weight bahut zyada hota hai

questions.explanation: Modular design se product ke individual parts ko repair ya upgrade karna aasan ho jata hai, jisse uski lifespan badhti hai aur waste kam hota hai.

questions.question: Green chemistry principles ko manufacturing mein apply karne se kya fayda hota hai?

options.A: Hazardous substances ka use badhta hai
options.B: Safer chemicals aur processes ka use hota hai
options.D: Product ki effectiveness kam ho jati hai

questions.explanation: Green chemistry ka aim hai chemical products aur processes ko design karna jo hazardous substances ka use aur generation kam karein.

questions.question: Agar aap ek eco-friendly packaging bana rahe hain, toh aapko kis material ko avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Biodegradable plastic

questions.explanation: Single-use polystyrene foam non-biodegradable hota hai aur environment ko bahut nuksan pahunchata hai.

questions.question: Water usage ko kam karne ke liye manufacturing process mein kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Water recycling systems install karna
options.C: Fresh water ka unlimited use karna

questions.explanation: Water recycling systems manufacturing mein use hone wale paani ko purify karke dobara use karne mein madad karte hain, jisse water conservation hota hai.

questions.question: Kon sa factor ek product ke environmental footprint ko significantly kam karta hai?

options.B: Excessive packaging
options.C: Use of renewable energy in production

questions.explanation: Production mein renewable energy ka use carbon emissions ko kam karta hai, jo ek product ke overall environmental footprint ko significantly reduce karta hai.

questions.question: Eco-friendly product design mein 'planned obsolescence' ko kyun avoid kiya jata hai?

options.A: Yeh product ko zyada durable banata hai
options.B: Yeh product ki lifespan ko artificially kam karta hai, jisse waste badhta hai
options.C: Yeh manufacturing costs ko kam karta hai

questions.explanation: Planned obsolescence product ko ek nishchit samay ke baad kharab hone ke liye design karna hai, jo eco-friendly principles ke khilaf hai kyunki yeh waste badhata hai.

questions.question: Closed-loop manufacturing system ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.A: New raw materials par dependency badhana
options.B: Waste ko eliminate karna aur resources ko circulate karna

questions.explanation: Closed-loop system mein materials ko continuously recycle aur reuse kiya jata hai, jisse waste zero ho aur resource efficiency badhe.

questions.question: Agar aap ek eco-friendly detergent bana rahe hain, toh aapko kon se ingredients se bachna chahiye?

options.B: Phosphates

questions.explanation: Phosphates water bodies mein algal bloom ka karan bante hain, jo aquatic life ke liye harmful hai, isliye unhein avoid karna chahiye.

questions.question: Kon sa factor eco-friendly manufacturing ke liye sabse kam important hai?

options.B: Minimizing toxic emissions

questions.explanation: Brand popularity, although important for business, directly eco-friendly manufacturing principles se related nahi hai, jabki baaki factors direct environmental impact se jude hain.

questions.question: Bio-based materials ka use manufacturing mein kis principle ko support karta hai?

options.B: Renewable resource utilization

questions.explanation: Bio-based materials plants ya other renewable biological sources se aate hain, jo fossil fuels par nirbharta kam karte hain.

questions.question: Manufacturing process mein heat recovery systems install karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Energy waste ko kam karna

questions.explanation: Heat recovery systems exhaust heat ko capture karke use dobara use karte hain, jisse overall energy consumption aur waste kam hota hai.

questions.question: Ek product ko 'lightweight' design karne ka kya environmental benefit hai?

options.A: Zyada packaging ki zaroorat padti hai
options.B: Transportation ke dauraan fuel consumption kam hota hai
options.D: Manufacturing mein zyada material lagta hai

questions.explanation: Lightweight products ko transport karne mein kam fuel lagta hai, jisse carbon emissions kam hote hain.

questions.question: Recycled paper banane ke liye sabse common raw material kya hai?

options.B: Old newspapers aur magazines

questions.explanation: Old newspapers, magazines aur cardboard boxes recycled paper ke liye mukhya raw materials hote hain.

questions.question: Natural dyes banane ke liye kon sa plant use kiya jata hai?

options.B: Indigo plant

questions.explanation: Indigo plant se neela rang banta hai, jo kapdon ko dye karne ke liye natural tareeke se use hota hai.

questions.question: Organic cotton fabric ke liye kon sa certification important hai?

options.B: GOTS (Global Organic Textile Standard)

questions.explanation: GOTS ek international standard hai jo organic fibers ke poore supply chain ke environmental aur social criteria ko ensure karta hai.

questions.question: DIY eco-friendly cleaning spray banane ke liye kon se ingredients ka combination accha hai?

options.B: Vinegar, Baking Soda aur Lemon Juice

questions.explanation: Vinegar, baking soda aur lemon juice natural cleaning agents hain jo effective aur safe hote hain.

questions.question: Biodegradable cutlery banane ke liye kon sa material use kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Polypropylene

questions.explanation: Corn starch aur bamboo jaise natural materials biodegradable cutlery banane ke liye use hote hain, jo plastic ka sustainable alternative hai.

questions.question: Eco-friendly paint mein kya avoid kiya jata hai jo normal paint mein hota hai?

options.B: Natural pigments

questions.explanation: VOCs harmful chemicals hote hain jo hawa mein evaporate hokar pollution karte hain. Eco-friendly paints mein inka level kam ya zero hota hai.

questions.question: Reusable shopping bags banane ke liye kon sa material sabse suitable hai?

options.B: Non-woven polypropylene (recycled)

questions.explanation: Recycled non-woven polypropylene bags durable, lightweight aur reusable hote hain, jo plastic bags ka accha vikalp hain.

questions.question: Solar-powered products ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Renewable energy ka use karte hain
options.C: Sirf raat mein kaam karte hain
options.D: Heavy maintenance ki zaroorat hoti hai

questions.explanation: Solar-powered products surya ki roshni se energy generate karte hain, jisse fossil fuels par dependance kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Compostable waste bags kis material se bante hain?

options.B: Plant-based polymers (PLA)

questions.explanation: Compostable bags aksar plant-based polymers jaise PLA (Polylactic Acid) se bante hain, jo compost facilities mein decompose ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Eco-friendly packaging mein kon sa approach sabse behtar hai?

options.B: Minimalist, recycled aur recyclable packaging
options.D: Packaging jo sirf ek baar use ho

questions.explanation: Minimalist, recycled aur recyclable packaging waste ko kam karta hai aur resources ko preserve karta hai.

questions.question: Aap ek purane tyre ko upcycle karke kya bana sakte hain?

options.B: Ek planter ya furniture

questions.explanation: Purane tyres ko upcycle karke planters, outdoor furniture ya swings jaise functional aur decorative items banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Kon sa household product eco-friendly version mein banaya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Reusable bamboo toothbrushes

questions.explanation: Reusable bamboo toothbrushes plastic toothbrushes ka ek sustainable alternative hai jo waste kam karte hain.

questions.question: Kon sa product category 'zero-waste' lifestyle ko support karta hai?

options.B: Bulk food items in reusable containers

questions.explanation: Bulk food items ko apne reusable containers mein khareedna packaging waste ko khatam karta hai, jo zero-waste lifestyle ka ek important hissa hai.

questions.question: Eco-friendly sanitary pads banane ke liye kon sa material use hota hai?

options.B: Chlorine-bleached cotton

questions.explanation: Organic cotton ya bamboo fiber se bane sanitary pads biodegradable hote hain aur harmful chemicals se free hote hain, jo skin aur environment dono ke liye better hain.

questions.question: Agar aap ek beeswax wrap bana rahe hain, toh aap kis plastic product ka replacement bana rahe hain?

options.B: Cling film (plastic wrap)

questions.explanation: Beeswax wraps food ko store karne ke liye cling film ka reusable aur natural alternative hain.

questions.question: Kon sa cleaning tool plastic sponges ka eco-friendly alternative hai?

options.B: Loofah scrubber ya coconut coir brush

questions.explanation: Natural loofah aur coconut coir brushes biodegradable hote hain aur plastic sponges ka accha alternative hain.

questions.question: Eco-friendly stationery products mein kya shamil ho sakta hai?

options.B: Recycled paper notebooks aur bamboo pens

questions.explanation: Recycled paper aur bamboo pens jaise products sustainable stationery options hain jo plastic aur virgin resources ka use kam karte hain.

questions.question: Eco-label ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Consumers ko product ki environmental performance ke baare mein inform karna
options.C: Product ko green color mein dye karna

questions.explanation: Eco-labels third-party certifications hote hain jo batate hain ki ek product certain environmental standards ko meet karta hai.

questions.question: Kon sa certification organic food products ke liye important hai?

options.B: FSSAI Organic India

questions.explanation: FSSAI Organic India certification Bharat mein organic food products ke liye government-backed standard hai.

questions.question: Sustainable packaging design ka ek key principle kya hai?

options.B: Minimize material use aur maximize recyclability
options.C: Packaging ko difficult to open banana

questions.explanation: Sustainable packaging ka aim hai material consumption ko kam karna aur packaging ko recyclable, reusable ya compostable banana.

questions.question: Agar aap ek eco-friendly product ki marketing kar rahe hain, toh aapko kis par focus karna chahiye?

options.B: Product ke environmental benefits aur quality par

questions.explanation: Eco-friendly products ki marketing mein unke environmental benefits, sustainable sourcing aur quality par highlight karna chahiye.

questions.question: Kon sa factor eco-friendly product ki quality control mein shamil hai?

options.A: Sirf product ka color check karna
options.B: Raw materials ki sustainability aur product ki durability check karna

questions.explanation: Eco-friendly products ki quality control mein raw materials ki sustainability, production process ki efficiency aur final product ki durability aur performance shamil hai.

questions.question: Green marketing ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Products ko sirf green colour mein bechna
options.B: Products aur services ko environmental benefits ke saath promote karna
options.C: Marketing mein zyada paisa kharch karna

questions.explanation: Green marketing mein products aur services ko unke environmental attributes ke base par promote kiya jata hai, jisse conscious consumers ko attract kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Ek eco-friendly product ke liye packaging material choose karte samay aap kis baat ka dhyan rakhenge?

options.B: Woh non-recyclable ho
options.C: Woh recycled, recyclable ya compostable ho

questions.explanation: Eco-friendly packaging materials aise hone chahiye jo environment par kam se kam impact dalein aur easily decompose ya recycle ho sakein.

questions.question: Traceability ka kya mahatva hai eco-friendly products mein?

options.B: Product ke raw materials aur production process ki transparency ensure karna

questions.explanation: Traceability se consumers aur stakeholders ko product ke raw materials, sourcing aur production ke baare mein poori jaankari milti hai, jisse trust badhta hai.

questions.question: Kon sa eco-label textile products ke liye widely recognized hai?

options.B: Fairtrade Cotton

questions.explanation: Fairtrade Cotton certification ethical sourcing aur sustainable farming practices ko ensure karta hai, khaaskar cotton textiles ke liye.

questions.question: Social media ka use eco-friendly products ki marketing mein kaise madad karta hai?

options.B: Environmental awareness failakar aur sustainable lifestyle ko promote karke

questions.explanation: Social media platforms environmental awareness badhane, sustainable products ko promote karne aur engaged community banane ke liye effective hain.

questions.question: Ek product ko 'carbon neutral' certify karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Uske production mein koi carbon dioxide release nahi hui
options.B: Uske carbon emissions ko reduce aur offset kar diya gaya hai
options.C: Woh sirf carbon se bana hai
options.D: Woh bahut zyada carbon emissions karta hai

questions.explanation: Carbon neutral ka matlab hai ki product ke production aur life cycle se hone wale carbon emissions ko calculate karke unhein reduce aur bache hue ko offset kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Quality control mein 'batch testing' kyun important hai eco-friendly products ke liye?

options.A: Har product ko individually check karne ke liye
options.B: Yeh ensure karne ke liye ki ek particular batch ke products standard ko meet karte hain
options.D: Product ki expiry date check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Batch testing se yeh ensure hota hai ki ek specific production run ke sabhi products consistent quality aur environmental standards ko maintain karte hain.

questions.question: Agar aap ek naya eco-friendly product launch kar rahe hain, toh aapko kis type ke consumers ko target karna chahiye?

options.B: Environmentally conscious aur value-driven consumers
options.D: Consumers jo sirf disposable items pasand karte hain

questions.explanation: Environmentally conscious consumers eco-friendly products ki value aur impact ko samajhte hain aur unke liye payment karne ko bhi taiyar rehte hain.

questions.question: Transparency in supply chain ka kya fayda hai eco-friendly product marketing mein?

options.B: Consumer trust aur brand credibility badhana
options.C: Competitors ko copy karne ka mauka dena

questions.explanation: Transparent supply chain consumers ko product ke ethical aur sustainable practices ke baare mein yakin dilati hai, jisse trust badhta hai.

questions.question: Ek eco-friendly product ki packaging par 'FSC certified' logo ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Packaging material responsibly managed forests se aata hai
options.D: Packaging ko recycle nahi kiya ja sakta

questions.explanation: FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) certification yeh ensure karta hai ki wood aur paper products sustainably managed forests se aate hain.

questions.question: Product ki 'end-of-life' options ko communicate karna marketing ka kaisa hissa hai?

options.B: Responsible marketing practice

questions.explanation: Consumers ko yeh batana ki product ko kaise dispose ya recycle karna hai, ek responsible marketing practice hai jo waste management mein madad karti hai aur brand ki credibility badhati hai.

questions.question: Eco-friendly products ke liye market demand kyun badh rahi hai?

options.A: Log environment ke prati kam conscious ho rahe hain
options.B: Environmental awareness aur health concerns badh rahe hain
options.C: Eco-friendly products bahut saste hote hain
options.D: Sirf government inhein promote karti hai

questions.explanation: Badhti hui environmental awareness aur health concerns ke karan log zyada eco-friendly aur sustainable options ki taraf badh rahe hain.

questions.question: Ek small business jo eco-friendly products banata hai, uske liye sabse bada challenge kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Sustainable raw materials ki consistent sourcing aur high cost
options.C: Products ko bechna bahut aasan hota hai
options.D: Government ki taraf se unlimited support

questions.explanation: Sustainable raw materials ki sourcing mushkil ho sakti hai aur unki initial cost conventional materials se zyada ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Business plan mein 'Unique Selling Proposition (USP)' ka kya matlab hai eco-friendly products ke liye?

options.B: Woh khaas baat jo aapke product ko competitors se alag banati hai, jaise uski sustainability

questions.explanation: USP woh factor hai jo aapke product ko market mein unique banata hai, aur eco-friendly products ke liye yeh unki sustainability aur environmental benefits ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Eco-friendly product business ke liye 'local sourcing' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Carbon footprint kam hota hai aur local economy ko support milta hai
options.C: Raw materials ki quality kam hoti hai
options.D: Sirf imported goods behtar hote hain

questions.explanation: Local sourcing se transport emissions kam hote hain, aur yeh local suppliers aur communities ko support karta hai.

questions.question: Crowdfunding eco-friendly startups ke liye ek accha option kyun ho sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf bade investors se funding milti hai
options.B: Yeh environmental cause ke liye support generate karta hai

questions.explanation: Crowdfunding se log directly environmental causes aur sustainable businesses ko support kar sakte hain, jisse funding aur community engagement dono milte hain.

questions.question: Government subsidies aur incentives eco-friendly businesses ko kaise madad karte hain?

options.B: Sustainable practices ko adopt karne ke liye financial support dete hain
options.D: Unhein competition se rok dete hain

questions.explanation: Government subsidies aur incentives businesses ko eco-friendly technologies aur practices mein invest karne ke liye encourage karte hain.

questions.question: Eco-friendly products ki pricing strategy mein kya consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Production cost, perceived value, aur competitive pricing
options.C: Competitors se bahut zyada price rakhna

questions.explanation: Eco-friendly products ki pricing mein unki higher production cost, environmental benefits ki perceived value aur market competition ko dhyan mein rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Kon sa factor eco-friendly business ke liye 'brand loyalty' banane mein madad karta hai?

options.B: Consistent quality, transparency aur strong brand values

questions.explanation: Consistent quality, transparent practices aur strong brand values jo sustainability ko support karte hain, customers mein loyalty develop karte hain.

questions.question: Small-scale eco-friendly product manufacturing ke liye kon sa distribution channel effective ho sakta hai?

options.B: Online store, local markets aur specialty boutiques

questions.explanation: Online stores, local markets aur specialty boutiques small businesses ko apne target audience tak pahunchne mein madad karte hain, kam cost mein.

questions.question: Agar aap apne business ko 'scale up' karna chahte hain, toh kya zaroori hai?

options.A: Raw materials ki supply chain ko ignore karna
options.B: Production capacity badhana aur sustainable practices maintain karna
options.C: Quality control par dhyan na dena
options.D: Sirf ek product par stick rehna

questions.explanation: Scaling up ke liye production capacity badhana aur uske saath sustainable sourcing aur manufacturing practices ko maintain karna critical hai.

questions.question: Kon sa trend eco-friendly product market ke liye positive hai?

options.B: Increased awareness about climate change and waste

questions.explanation: Climate change aur waste ke baare mein badhti hui awareness consumers ko sustainable options ki taraf push karti hai.

questions.question: Eco-friendly product business mein 'innovation' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Naye products aur processes develop karna jo zyada sustainable hon
options.B: Purane methods ko hi follow karna

questions.explanation: Innovation se naye, more efficient aur sustainable products aur manufacturing processes develop hote hain, jo business ko competitive banate hain.

questions.question: Ek eco-friendly business ke liye 'ethical sourcing' kyun important hai?

options.B: Workers ke rights aur environmental standards ko ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Products ko zyada mehenga banane ke liye
options.D: Supply chain ko complex banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Ethical sourcing yeh ensure karti hai ki raw materials ko responsibly aur fair labour practices ke saath obtain kiya gaya hai, jo brand image aur consumer trust ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Agar aap ek naya eco-friendly product business shuru kar rahe hain, toh 'market research' kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf competitors ki jaankari ke liye
options.B: Target audience ki needs aur preferences ko samajhne ke liye
options.C: Product ko jaldi-jaldi launch karne ke liye
options.D: Product ki price kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Market research se aapko apne potential customers ki needs, preferences aur environmental concerns ke baare mein pata chalta hai, jisse aap sahi product bana sakte hain.

questions.question: Kon sa factor eco-friendly product business ke long-term success ke liye sabse zyada critical hai?

options.B: Continuous commitment to sustainability aur product quality

questions.explanation: Long-term success ke liye, ek eco-friendly business ko apni core values of sustainability aur product quality par consistent rehna hoga.

questions.question: Ek eco-friendly product business ke liye 'community engagement' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Brand awareness badhana aur ek loyal customer base banana
options.C: Competitors ke products ko criticize karna

questions.explanation: Community engagement se aap apne customers ke saath connect karte hain, unhein apne mission mein shamil karte hain, jisse brand awareness aur loyalty badhti hai.
